text: A leader is one who knows the way, goes the way, and shows the way.
author: John C. Maxwell

text: Before you are a leader, success is all about growing yourself. When you become a leader, success is all about growing others.
author: Jack Welch

text: Leadership is not about titles, positions or flowcharts. It is about one life influencing another.
author: John C. Maxwell

text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
author: Steve Jobs

text: The greatest leader is not necessarily the one who does the greatest things. He is the one that gets the people to do the greatest things.
author: Ronald Reagan

text: Leadership is the capacity to translate vision into reality.
author: Warren Bennis

text: To handle yourself, use your head; to handle others, use your heart.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

text: People ask the difference between a leader and a boss. The leader leads, and the boss drives.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

text: A good leader takes a little more than his share of the blame, a little less than his share of the credit.
author: Arnold H. Glasow

text: Do not follow where the path may lead. Go instead where there is no path and leave a trail.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

text: Leadership is unlocking people's potential to become better.
author: Bill Bradley

text: Earn your leadership every day.
author: Michael Jordan

text: The task of the leader is to get his people from where they are to where they have not been.
author: Henry Kissinger

text: A leader takes people where they want to go. A great leader takes people where they don't necessarily want to go, but ought to be.
author: Rosalynn Carter

text: Management is doing things right; leadership is doing the right things.
author: Peter F. Drucker

text: If your actions inspire others to dream more, learn more, do more and become more, you are a leader.
author: John Quincy Adams

text: Good leaders organize and align people around what the team needs to do. Great leaders motivate and inspire people with why they're doing it.
author: Marillyn Hewson

text: You don't lead by pointing and telling people some place to go. You lead by going to that place and making a case.
author: Ken Kesey

text: No man will make a great leader who wants to do it all himself or get all the credit for doing it.
author: Andrew Carnegie

text: Great leaders are willing to sacrifice their own personal interests for the good of the team.
author: John Wooden

text: The role of a creative leader is not to have all the ideas; it's to create a culture where everyone can have ideas and feel that they're valued.
author: Ken Robinson

text: As we look ahead into the next century, leaders will be those who empower others.
author: Bill Gates

text: Example is not the main thing in influencing others. It is the only thing.
author: Albert Schweitzer

text: The function of leadership is to produce more leaders, not more followers.
author: Ralph Nader

text: A genuine leader is not a searcher for consensus but a molder of consensus.
author: Martin Luther King Jr.

text: Keep your fears to yourself, but share your courage with others.
author: Robert Louis Stevenson

text: The speed of the boss is the speed of the team.
author: Lee Iacocca

text: Leadership is the art of giving people a platform for spreading ideas that work.
author: Seth Godin

text: One of the tests of leadership is the ability to recognize a problem before it becomes an emergency.
author: Arnold H. Glasow

text: The price of greatness is responsibility.
author: Winston Churchill

text: Effective leadership is not about making speeches or being liked; leadership is defined by results not attributes.
author: Peter F. Drucker

text: I suppose leadership at one time meant muscles; but today it means getting along with people.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

text: You cannot be a leader, and ask other people to follow you, unless you know how to follow, too.
author: Sam Rayburn

text: To be a leader, you must stand for something, or you will fall for anything.
author: Anthony J. D'Angelo

text: When the best leader's work is done the people say, 'We did it ourselves.'
author: Lao Tzu

text: A ruler should be slow to punish and swift to reward.
author: Ovid

text: Great leadership is about human experiences. It's not a formula or a program, it is a human activity that comes from the heart.
author: Lance Secretan

text: The supreme quality for leadership is unquestionably integrity. Without it, no real success is possible.
author: Dwight D. Eisenhower

text: Leaders aren't born, they are made. And they are made just like anything else, through hard work.
author: Vince Lombardi

text: Leadership is active, not passive.
author: Anonymous
